name: Impossible Seafood Pie
recipeIngredient: Betty GARNES: 2 oz Chopped pimento, drained if necessary
1 cup Shredded process sharp American cheese
3 ounces Cream cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease pie plate (10 x 11/2 inch).
3. Mix crabmeat, cheeses, onions, and pimento in the plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients smooth for 15 seconds in a blender or 1 minute with a hand beater.
5. Pour mixture into the plate.
6. Bake until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean, about 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Alternatively, 1 can (6 oz) crabmeat, drained and cartilege removed, or 1 can (4 1/2 oz) shrimp, well rinsed and drained, can be substituted for the frozen crabmeat.
